videos.title: Afriski hosts SA Alpine Ski Champs
videos.description: Afriski, in the north of Lesotho near the South African border, has become the host of the annual Alpine Ski Championships, and for the last decade, the sport has grown rapidly, to the point where South Africa contributed several athletes to the 2006 Winter Olympics in Turin, and is grooming up some new stars who dream of representing their country in the 2014 Winter Olympics in Sochi, Russia.  But for athletes who only get access to snow three months a year, it's a tough challenge to take on the best of Europe, North America or Australia -- are they up to the job?
